name: Frisco Open Top Cat Litter Box With Rim, Large 19-in
description: This open-top litter box from Frisco by Chewy provides a roomy, private place for cats to do their business. To keep litter and spray inside the box, there’s a rim around the sides and back wall that also acts as a privacy shield. Cats can step in and out of the box easily through the lowered front side, and the removable top rim and open-box design make it easy to scoop the litter or spot clean small messes. This litter box is made with BPA-free plastic that’s recyclable, so it’s ready for plenty of digging and pawing around, and perfect for eco-minded households.
